ops.title: cc-transcript v10 cutover: land the unshipped mining.sampling + watch WIP upstream
ops.description: Recon 2026-07-12: NOT a rename/migration — these symbols never existed in any cc-transcript commit. They live only as uncommitted working-tree WIP on a detached HEAD in ~/Code/cc-transcript (git status: A mining/sampling.py, A watch.py, A tests for both, M mining/__init__.py). cc-steer's cd272da (negatives.py:29 sample_windows import; watcher/daemon.py:32 cc_transcript.watch import) was co-developed against that WIP. No cc-steer-side fix exists: CI clones origin/main fresh. Fix belongs upstream: review + commit + push the WIP (author's own working code), cut a release. Until then main CI pytest is red at collection on those 5 modules (Linux ty is green).

ops.text: cc_transcript/mining/sampling.py (sample_windows, fold_trigger, turn_anchor) and cc_transcript/watch.py (TailState, tick, WatchEvent) committed + pushed to yasyf/cc-transcript main and released >=10.x; cc-steer CI pytest collects all 5 modules (test_cli_sync/daemon/negatives/pipeline/shadow) green
